# robots.txt — Learning Port Foundation Trust
# https://www.learningportfoundation.org/robots.txt

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Disallow admin / private paths (add as needed)
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /*.json$

# Crawl delay for polite bots
Crawl-delay: 10

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://www.learningportfoundation.org/sitemap.xml

# Allow major search engine bots explicitly
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /

User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Allow: /

User-agent: facebookexternalhit
Allow: /

User-agent: Twitterbot
Allow: /

User-agent: LinkedInBot
Allow: /

User-agent: WhatsApp
Allow: /
